This maintains efficacy in humid conditions.

CRAS (Catfish Recirculation System) uses a 2 L/ kg/day growth rate on African Catfish (A. niger) with 95% water recirculation. Add 10 g urea per litre of water for phosphorus management. The Tripartite Canopy Method uses a 2 m height pole at the center of a 4 m diameter circle. Plant 3 rows of Gumbo (Guizotia abyssinica) at 2 m intervals around the pole. Tephrosa vogelii (Kirk) Sacc. is a leguminous crop intercropped with soybean (Glycine max) in East Africa.
